app_title: Buğra Kaan Sağlam | Mobile & Web Engineer

hero.title: Building production-grade mobile products with performance-first UX.
hero.subtitle: Sole front-end engineer for enterprise healthcare systems and independent app launches. I build fast interfaces, reliable auth/session flows, and release-ready products across stores.
hero.status: Scaling DuruGlobal and Desk4Dent with multi-tenant architecture, secure data flows, and production release pipelines.

about.body: Sole front-end engineer building cross-platform mobile apps with .NET MAUI and Flutter. Delivered two enterprise healthcare inventory apps end-to-end and shipped independent products with a focus on performance, UX, and robust store release workflows.
